recommendations.title: GIN index for product search FTS
recommendations.detail: Replace sequential scan on ILIKE with to_tsvector + GIN for name/description.
sql_snippets: CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY IF NOT EXISTS idx_products_fts ON products USING gin(to_tsvector('english', coalesce(name,'') || ' ' || coalesce(description,'')))

recommendations.title: Batch or join dashboard queries
recommendations.detail: Eliminate N+1 by loading related rows in one query or batched IN list.
